scripts.clean: npm run clean:admin && npm run clean:app && npm run clean:dashboard
scripts.build: npm run build:admin && npm run build:app && npm run build:dashboard
scripts.lint: npm run lint:admin  && npm run lint:app && npm run lint:dashboard
scripts.watch: conc -n admin,app,dashboard -c auto "npm run watch:admin" "npm run watch:app" "npm run watch:dashboard"
